messages.content: EDIT: This groundbreaking legislation has propelled Germany to the forefront of digital health policy, not only by encouraging the use of digital health solutions but also by facilitating the utilization of health data for research purposes.

EDIT: This groundbreaking legislation has catapulted Germany to the forefront of digital health policy, as it not only promotes the adoption of digital health solutions but also facilitates the utilization of health data for research purposes.

edit: Germany’s leadership in digital health policy, combined with the large population covered under the statutory health insurance system, makes it an ideal setting for research in the field of digital health, particularly in the context of a cross-country study.

EDIT: Germany's pioneering role in digital health policy, coupled with its extensive coverage of the population under the statutory health insurance system, positions it as an ideal setting for conducting research in the field of digital health. This is especially true when considering cross-country studies, benefiting from Germany's unique healthcare landscape.

sumarize: Germany’s leadership in digital health policy, combined with the large population covered under the statutory health insurance system, makes it an ideal setting for research in the field of digital health, particularly in the context of a cross-country study.

Germany's leadership in digital health policy, along with its extensive coverage of the population through the statutory health insurance system, makes it an ideal environment for conducting research in digital health. This is especially relevant for cross-country studies in the field.

sumarize : Germany’s leadership in digital health policy, along with its extensive coverage of the population through the statutory health insurance system, makes it an ideal environment for conducting research in digital health. This is especially relevant for cross-country studies in the field.

Germany's digital health policy leadership and comprehensive coverage of the population through its statutory health insurance system create an ideal research ecosystem for digital health, particularly for cross-country studies in the field.

sumarize : My passion for digital adoption research took shape during my doctoral studies. I obtained my Ph.D. in Management, specializing in IT Management, in 2015 from the University of Technology, Malaysia in collaboration with the University of Nebraska, Omaha, USA. For my Ph.D. research, I delved into the IT-business strategic alignment, an essential aspect of digital transformation. This laid the foundation for my continued research endeavors. I have since expanded my work and have been fortunate to publish over 40 papers in peer-reviewed journals and refereed conferences. During my academic journey, I also had the opportunity to share my knowledge and expertise as a part-time lecturer at prestigious universities such as Shahid Beheshti University. I took immense joy in teaching IT management courses and supervising the thesis work of over 40 master’s and bachelor’s students. These teaching and mentoring experiences have greatly enriched my understanding of the field of IT management and digitalization. To complement my academic pursuits, I gained practical insights and skills in IT management, digital transformation, and the adoption of digital technology and mobile apps through my work experience at Keshavarzi bank. In recent times, the significance of digital health adoption has become even more evident, particularly in the face of the COVID-19 pandemic. Consequently, my most recent research interests have focused on exploring the adoption of digital health solutions and the transformation of healthcare through digital technology.

During my doctoral studies, I developed a passion for digital adoption research. I earned my Ph.D. in Management, specializing in IT Management, from the University of Technology, Malaysia in collaboration with the University of Nebraska, Omaha, USA in 2015. My research focused on IT-business strategic alignment, a crucial aspect of digital transformation. This formed the basis for my ongoing research pursuits. I have since expanded my work, publishing over 40 papers in peer-reviewed journals and conferences. Additionally, I had the privilege of teaching IT management courses and supervising the thesis work of more than 40 students as a part-time lecturer at esteemed institutions like Shahid Beheshti University. These teaching experiences enriched my understanding of IT management and digitalization. To complement my academic pursuits, I gained practical insights and skills in IT management, digital transformation, and digital technology adoption through my work at Keshavarzi bank. The significance of digital health adoption has become increasingly apparent, particularly due to the COVID-19 pandemic. As a result, my recent research interests have focused on exploring the adoption of digital health solutions and the transformation of healthcare through digital technology.

I took immense joy in teaching IT management courses and supervising the thesis work of over 40 master’s and bachelor’s students. These teaching and mentoring experiences have greatly enriched my understanding of the field of IT management and digitalization

During my academic journey, I had the privilege of serving as a part-time lecturer at renowned universities, including Shahid Beheshti University. I thoroughly enjoyed teaching IT management courses and supervising the thesis work of more than 40 master's and bachelor's students. These enriching teaching and mentoring experiences significantly contributed to my understanding of IT management and digitalization.

sumarize :I also had the opportunity to share my knowledge and expertise as a part-time lecturer at prestigious universities such as Shahid Beheshti University and supervising the thesis work of over 40 master’s and bachelor’s students.

I had the privilege of serving as a part-time lecturer at esteemed universities such as Shahid Beheshti University, where I shared my knowledge and expertise. I also had the opportunity to supervise the thesis work of more than 40 master's and bachelor's students, further enriching my understanding in the field.

sumarize : I am currently working as a visiting researcher at the University of Hagen in Germany, where I am involved in funded research projects in Digital Health Acceptance. Specifically, I am conducting research projects that explore the adoption of digital therapeutics (DTx) and digital health transformation. As a result of my ongoing work, I am currently in the process of developing five research journal articles as contributions to the field.

Currently, as a visiting researcher at the University of Hagen in Germany, my focus is on funded research projects in Digital Health Acceptance. I am actively involved in exploring the adoption of digital therapeutics (DTx) and conducting research on digital health transformation. As a result, I am in the process of developing five research journal articles as valuable contributions to the field.

My focus is specifically on the adoption of digital therapeutics (DTx) and the broader digital health transformation. Through my ongoing work, I am in the process of developing five research journal articles that will contribute significantly to the field.

Currently, as a visiting researcher at the University of Hagen in Germany, I am actively involved in funded research projects focusing on Digital Health Acceptance. My research is specifically centered around the adoption of digital therapeutics (DTx) and the broader transformation of digital health. Through my ongoing work, I am in the process of developing five research journal articles that will serve as valuable contributions to the field.
